title: OpenHermes Handoff Envelope
description: Strict envelope for handoffs between OpenHermes agents.
$comment: task_id must be a 26-character ULID using Crockford base32.

task_id.description: Stable ULID identifier for this handoff envelope.

origin_agent.description: Agent that produced the handoff envelope.

target_agent.description: Agent that is expected to receive and act on the handoff envelope.

request_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the requested work.

governance_class.description: Governance sensitivity class for the handoff.

routing_profile.description: Routing profile name chosen for the handoff.

risk_level.description: Risk level assessed for the requested work.

requires_halt.description: Whether execution must halt for review or approval before continuing.

budget.description: Execution budget applied to the handoff.
budget.$comment: All budget limits are required positive integers.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens that may be consumed while handling the handoff.

max_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock seconds allowed for the handoff.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool calls allowed for the handoff.

artifacts.description: Structured artifacts already attached to the handoff.

items.description: Artifact payload object. Shape is determined by the producing subsystem.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the handoff.

next_action.description: Immediate next action expected from the receiving agent.

audit.description: Optional audit metadata captured when the handoff is created.

created_at.description: Creation time in ISO 8601 date-time format.

created_by.description: Human or system principal that created the envelope.

trace_id.description: Trace identifier used to correlate related events.
